title: The Scary Mods
description: A horror-themed Minecraft modpack combining new biomes, dimensions, custom gear, and terrifying creatures for an immersive yet balanced survival experience.
body:
Eclipse Depths – Survival in the Shadows

Enter a world consumed by darkness, where survival is no longer guaranteed. This modpack combines several unique horror experiences into one relentless challenge. Every sound, every step, and every shadow could be your last.

Core Experience

  • Challenging survival mechanics that test your strategic thinking.
  • Dynamic environments filled with unpredictable dangers and disturbing encounters.
  • Enhanced world generation transforms familiar landscapes into something unsettling and alien.
  • Increased difficulty that rewards strategy, precision, and courage.

Immersion and Performance

  • Optimized for smooth performance.
  • Balanced configuration ensures the game remains challenging without being unfair.
